reviews.body:
## Pull request overview Adds “failure learning” to the reactree agent runtime by storing failure episodes (with reflections + importance), retrieving episodic memory with recency/importance weighting, and injecting consolidated daily “wisdom” notes into prompts. **Changes:** - Extend episodic memory episodes with `Reflection`, `Importance`, and `CreatedAt`, and add `RetrieveWeighted` scoring/sorting. - Add interfaces in `memory/` and LLM-backed implementations in `reactree/` for failure reflection, importance scoring, and episode summarization. - Add wisdom storage + daily consolidation flow and wire new dependencies through `Toggles` → `tree` → `AgentNodeConfig` (including loop-level failure capture in `tree_v2`). ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 25 out of 25 changed files in this pull request and generated 6 comments.
Show a summary per file | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | qa/20260310_failure_learning.md | Manual acceptance criteria + automated test inventory for failure learning and consolidation. | | pkg/reactree/tree_v2.go | Stores loop-level failure episodes; passes new learning deps into AgentNodeConfig (v2 loop). | | pkg/reactree/tree.go | Wires FailureReflector/ImportanceScorer/WisdomStore from Toggles into tree and agent nodes. | | pkg/reactree/memory/wisdom.go | Implements WisdomStore backed by `memory.Service` + no-op variant. | | pkg/reactree/memory/reaction_test.go | Updates test fake episodic memory to satisfy new interface method. | | pkg/reactree/memory/memoryfakes/fake_wisdom_store.go | Counterfeiter fake for WisdomStore. | | pkg/reactree/memory/memoryfakes/fake_importance_scorer.go | Counterfeiter fake for ImportanceScorer. | | pkg/reactree/memory/memoryfakes/fake_failure_reflector.go | Counterfeiter fake for FailureReflector. | | pkg/reactree/memory/memoryfakes/fake_episodic_memory.go | Counterfeiter fake updated with `RetrieveWeighted`. | | pkg/reactree/memory/memoryfakes/fake_episode_summarizer.go | Counterfeiter fake for EpisodeSummarizer. | | pkg/reactree/memory/importance_scorer.go | Adds ImportanceScorer interface + no-op implementation. | | pkg/reactree/memory/failure_reflector.go | Adds FailureReflector interface + no-op implementation. | | pkg/reactree/memory/failure_learning_test.go | Unit tests for reflection formatting, CreatedAt, JSON roundtrip, and weighted retrieval. | | pkg/reactree/memory/episodic.go | Adds episode fields, CreatedAt backfill, weighted retrieval scoring, and formatting changes. | | pkg/reactree/memory/consolidation_test.go | Tests WisdomStore behavior, prompt formatting, consolidator behavior, and no-op scorer. | | pkg/reactree/memory/consolidation.go | Adds EpisodeConsolidator + prompt rendering for wisdom notes. | | pkg/reactree/importance_scorer.go | LLM-backed importance scorer + parsing/clamping helper. | | pkg/reactree/importance_and_consolidation_test.go | Tests importance parsing/clamping + episode summarization behavior. | | pkg/reactree/features.go | Adds new Toggles fields for learning components (reflector/scorer/wisdom store). | | pkg/reactree/failure_reflector_test.go | Tests LLM-backed failure reflection behavior (truncation, model choice, error handling). | | pkg/reactree/failure_reflector.go | LLM-backed failure reflection + fallback behavior helper. | | pkg/reactree/episode_summarizer.go | LLM-backed episode summarizer used for daily wisdom consolidation. | | pkg/reactree/agent_node_pvt_test.go | Updates prompt-building tests to use weighted retrieval + failure reflection formatting. | | pkg/reactree/agent_node.go | Stores failure episodes (instead of discarding), injects wisdom notes, uses weighted retrieval, scores importance. | | CHANGELOG.md | Adds release heading for 0.1.7 (2026-03-10). |
